title: Ab Initio Quantum Chemistry for Electron Correlation: From Theoretical Foundations to Drug Discovery Applications
description: A comprehensive overview of ab initio quantum chemistry methodologies for treating electron correlation. This article explores the foundational theories, details key computational methods from post-Hartree-Fock to modern quantum-inspired techniques, and addresses practical challenges in implementation. The discussion extends to validation strategies and comparative analysis, with a specific focus on applications in pharmaceutical research, including drug-target interactions, solvation effects, and reaction profiling.
